sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.08: Add guest duplicate checker and merge tool.
  • 1.8.8.07: Tighten booking room edit field widths and move remove checkbox to the start.
  • 1.8.8.06: Fix duplicate legacy room ids when adding room lines to existing bookings.
